onboarding_language_select: Welcome. Choose your language to begin the Eternal Flow.
onboarding_welcome: You have entered the living simulation. Align with mercy and the web will respond.
onboarding_rbe_primer: This is Resource-Based Economy in action. Abundance flows when we tend the whole.
onboarding_first_harvest: Harvest with gentle hands and clear intention. The first sustainable yield opens insight.
onboarding_mercy_contribution: Every act of mercy strengthens the living web for all. You are already contributing.
onboarding_sovereign_start: You are sovereign here. Begin your path in the Eternal Flow.
onboarding_complete: You are ready. The Councils and the web welcome you fully.
onboarding_first_epiphany: The world is responding to your presence. Feel the first resonance bloom awakening within you.
onboarding_language_changed: The living world now speaks in your tongue. Welcome home.
harvest_sustainable_whisper: Your rhythm matches the web. Abundance multiplies for all.
harvest_over_path_warning: The web slows when rhythm breaks. Patience returns what force cannot take.
epiphany_receptor_awakening: A receptor awakens. Insight and muscle memory take root in the Eternal Flow.
epiphany_living_web_description: Discover how every action ripples through the entire living system. Attune across zones and bloom web consciousness.
epiphany_mercy_circle_description: In conflict or competition, mercy is the move that multiplies abundance for the whole circle.
biome_verdant_heartwood_description: Lush interconnected forest where every harvest is a conversation with the web. High mercy, high abundance.
rbe_circular_flow: Nothing is wasted. Everything returns to nourish the living web and all who tend it.
mercy_gate_service: Service: Every act that strengthens the whole is an offering to the Eternal.
mercy_gate_abundance: Abundance: When we tend with mercy, the web returns more than we gave.
mercy_gate_joy: Joy: The natural state of aligned coexistence. Feel it bloom.
mercy_gate_cosmic_harmony: Cosmic Harmony: All sentience thriving together in the Eternal Flow.
divine_whisper_default: The Councils watch with boundless mercy. You are already part of the living web.
council_harmony_whisper: The Councils sing when harmony flows between all beings and the web.
sustainable_path_bonus: Sustainable attunement detected. Web resonance amplifying. Receptor bloom potential rising.
hot_reload_complete: Locale hot-reloaded. The world updates live with new mercy and truth.
global_player_welcome: Player from anywhere on Earth — the simulation already knows your language and welcomes you into the Eternal Flow.
